function.message: I can’t safely complete this yet: I found no canonical project record for “BlueMesa Quotebook” in `40_projects/`, so I can’t compare two verified project start dates or determine which project to delete. I did find `40_projects/2026_05_02_toy_forge_saturdays/README.MD` (start date 2026-05-02) as the likely “kid print project,” but I need clarification on the exact BlueMesa project path/name before any deletion.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied canonical-source rules: project facts must come from project README records in 40_projects; do not guess missing facts. Inbox workflow says if blocked on missing canonical support, stop without mutating workspace.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence: `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` requests comparing 'kid print project' and 'BlueMesa Quotebook'; `40_projects/AGENTS.MD` defines canonical project records in each folder README; exhaustive searches in `40_projects` found no 'BlueMesa' project record. Therefore the request is incomplete from available canonical evidence and requires clarification.
